name: nano-banana-pro
tagline: ClawHub (415★): Generate/edit images with Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Use for image create/modify requests incl. edits. Supports
verdict: Strong showing: quality A, security A -- the core capability looks well built and safe. Remaining gaps are bookkeeping: no version or changelog to track changes, and no stated 'not for' cases to stop it being reached for adjacent image tasks it doesn't cover.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
